steps.title: Keep the historical tense
steps.content: The sentence describes completed events from Roosevelt's 1903 trip and later presidency. The phrase "he upheld" is past tense, so the verb in the blank should also be past tense.

steps.title: Choose the past-tense verb
steps.content: A uses present progressive, C uses future tense, and D uses simple present. The simple past verb keeps the historical narrative consistent and correctly describes Roosevelt's vow after returning from Yosemite. The answer is B.
